name: William Montgomery
blurb: He is the longest-running regular on the Kill Tony podcast, known for an off-kilter, experimental stage presence.
bio: William Montgomery is an American stand-up comedian and improviser from Memphis, Tennessee, now based in Austin, Texas. He is the longest-running regular on the Kill Tony podcast, known for an off-kilter, experimental stage presence. He hosts The William Montgomery Show podcast and has opened for Tony Hinchcliffe and Joe Rogan.

timeline.ev: Launches The William Montgomery Show podcast
Becomes a recurring Kill Tony regular

bits.subj: Kill Tony panel set with Hans Kim & David Lucas

bits.yt_title: KILL TONY #579 - HANS KIM + WILLIAM MONTGOMERY + DAVID LUCAS
